prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity.

RCSB title: Spermine-blocked open-state cryo-EM structure of human TRPV6 channel in cNW30 nanodiscs. Entity description: Transient receptor potential cation channel subfamily V member 6. Entry keywords: MEMBRANE PROTEIN polyamine, spermine, cancer, cryo-EM, TRP channels, TRPV6, oncochannel, channel block, MEMBRANE PROTEIN. Polymer composition: homomeric protein. Sequence-derived non-coordinate summary: hydrophobic_density=0.506536; mean_interface=0.307481; max_segment_membrane_density=0.973545; mean_disorder=0.131032. Coordinates, contacts, native interface geometry, ligand geometry, and post-seal validation labels are unopened before prediction hash.

V68 E65 topology sentinel source. membrane_context_strong transmembrane_context topology_evidence transmembrane channel/pore; biological_oligomer_context may be incidental but explicit topology has priority. Coordinates, contacts, and native topology remain post-seal holdout only.
